name: Spaghetti with Shrimp & Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound asparagus, trimmed and cut into -1 inch pieces
8 ounces NAPOLINA Spaghetti, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat corn oil over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and asparagus; sauté for 2 minutes.
3. Add shrimp; sauté for 2 minutes or until pink.
4. Combine the remaining ingredients in a bowl.
5. Stirring constantly, add to the skillet.
6. Bring to boil over medium heat; boil for 1 minute.
7. Toss with spaghetti.
